candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash component only; less complete than cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance, but balance sheet source is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance sheet line.

candidates.row_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not balance sheet cash stock.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not cash balance.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Current financing liability, but leases must be excluded from STD under the baseline rule.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of lease obligations, but leases must be excluded from STD.
Lease-related total and not limited to short-term; also leases are excluded.

variables.notes: No non-lease short-term borrowings/current debt line is identifiable. Only lease-related current liabilities are shown, which are excluded from STD.

candidates.why: Tax-related label, but appears to be payroll withholding rather than income taxes payable/current tax liability.
Deferred tax is non-current tax accounting, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No clear current income taxes payable/current tax liabilities line is reported. 'Employee withholding tax' is not the target.

candidates.why: Best reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred over balancing or component lines.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Net total wording is relevant but this is a balancing value line and less clean than the main reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Office and IT Equipment - Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Only a component/gross line, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Office and IT Equipment - Tangible Assets - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Component balancing value, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Office and IT Equipment - Tangible Assets - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Impairment - Property, Plant & Equipment including Intangible Assets - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation adjustment, not balance sheet PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred the clean reported PPE line on the balance sheet.
